description_long: This sculpture depicts the bust of a figure with a tall, elaborate headdress, likely inspired by ancient Egyptian iconography. The face is detailed with pronounced features, including a defined brow, nose, and lips, and the ears are visible on both sides. The headdress is vertically elongated and appears damaged or eroded at the top, revealing a rough, uneven surface. The shoulders and upper chest are included, with some surface wear and missing fragments, suggesting age or exposure to the elements. The material appears to be a weathered stone or bronze with a dark, mottled patina. The back of the headdress is hollowed and rough, indicating either damage or an unfinished section.
description: A weathered bust of a figure with a tall, damaged headdress and detailed facial features, resembling ancient Egyptian art. The sculpture is made of dark, mottled stone or bronze and shows signs of age and erosion.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the face, headdress, and upper torso with clear facial features and symmetrical shoulders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the ear, and the vertical height of the headdress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hollowed, rough back of the headdress and the broad shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the damaged upper section of the headdress.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the background is isolated and does not indicate a particular environment.
